codeReview.summary: Reviewed the follow-up fix commit and supporting mission artifacts. The default search path now initializes `invalid_sources` to an empty slice when no explicit source filter is provided, and the added regression test exercises the exact `[]` vs `null` behavior alongside the earlier `papers` and `authors` empty-array coverage.

summary: Pass: the re-review confirms the original scrutiny failure is fixed. `internal/cli/search.go` now returns initialized empty slices for the default-source path, so successful default search responses serialize `invalid_sources` as `[]`, and `internal/cli/search_test.go` adds targeted regression coverage for that case without revealing new blocking issues.
